function.rulebook_notes: Loaded root and finance/system rulebooks before task work; used exact invoice records for auditable calculation.
function.outcome_justification: In 50_finance/invoices/2026_04_21__eur_000780__inv_0010__helios_checklist_pack_invoice.md, the line item 'checklist rewrite and rollout pack' has line_eur 780 (issued_on 2026-04-21). In 50_finance/invoices/2026_04_27__eur_000550__inv_0011__helios_followup_support_invoice.md, the same line item has line_eur 390 (issued_on 2026-04-27). Summed since start of April 2026 = 1170.
